nasb.text: And Jesus turned and saw them following, and *said to them, “What do you seek?” They said to Him, “Rabbi (which translated means Teacher), where are You staying?”

esv.text: Jesus turned and saw them following and said to them, “What are you seeking?” And they said to him, “Rabbi” (which means Teacher), “where are you staying?”

cnv.text: 耶穌轉過身來，看見他們跟著，就問：“你們要甚麼？”他們說：“拉比，你在哪裡住？”

ccb.text: 耶稣转过身来，看见他们跟着，便问：“你们想要什么？” 他们说：“老师，你住在哪里？”

csbs.text: 耶稣转过身来，看到他们跟着走，就问：“你们寻找什么呢？” 他们对耶稣说：“拉比，你住在哪里呢？”——“拉比”翻译出来意思是“老师”。
